mapper.select:
SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.reserved_at AS reservedAt, r.people_count AS peopleCount, r.deposit_amount AS depositAmount,
m.menu_id AS menuId, m.name AS menuName, m.price AS menuPrice, m.img AS menuImg, m.description AS menuDescription FROM reservation r JOIN menu m ON r.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE r.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND r.reserved_at >= NOW() ORDER BY r.reserved_at ASC

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.reserved_at AS reservedAt, r.people_count AS peopleCount, r.deposit_amount AS depositAmount,
m.menu_id AS menuId, m.name AS menuName, m.price AS menuPrice, m.img AS menuImg, m.description AS menuDescription FROM reservation r JOIN menu m ON r.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE r.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND r.menu_id = #{menuId} AND r.reserved_at >= NOW() ORDER BY r.reserved_at ASC

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.reserved_at AS reservedAt, r.people_count AS peopleCount, r.deposit_amount AS depositAmount,
m.menu_id AS menuId, m.name AS menuName, m.price AS menuPrice, m.img AS menuImg, m.description AS menuDescription FROM reservation r JOIN menu m ON r.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE r.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.reserved_at >= NOW() ORDER BY r.reserved_at ASC

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.reserved_at AS reservedAt, r.people_count AS peopleCount, r.deposit_amount AS depositAmount,
m.menu_id AS menuId, m.name AS menuName, m.price AS menuPrice, m.img AS menuImg, m.description AS menuDescription FROM reservation r JOIN menu m ON r.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND r.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND r.reserved_at >= NOW()
